title: Sergeant Symbol Catalog (per-package)
description: Per-workspace symbol export inventory. One file lives in each workspace directory as `symbols.json`; the aggregated `docs/04-governance/governance/symbol-index.json` indexes them. Generated by scripts/docs/generate-symbol-catalog.mjs.

entryFile.description: Repo-relative path of the entry file parsed for exports; null if no entry could be resolved.

totalImporters.description: Unique files (across all workspaces) that import from this package.

deadExports.description: Exports with `usageCount === 0`, excluding re-export-star and default.

name.description: Identifier as it appears in the entry file's export statement (or `*` for re-export-star).

fromFile.description: Module specifier when the export originates from a re-export (`export { x } from './mod'`).

usedBy.description: Sorted list of repo-relative file paths that import this symbol. Currently regex-derived — `import { x as y }` records `x`.
